blocker_notes: USAspending API + bulk archive. No key required. Top recipients are PR government agencies (PRDOH, ADSEF, PRDE, PRHA) — no corporate parent_uei is expected for these entities.
FPDS Report Builder FY2018-2024 ingestion. Supplements USAspending.
FSRS prime-to-sub reporting. Joins with USAspending subaward stream.
SAM full extract + per-UEI enrichment for parent resolution. Supplemented by scripts/usaspending_parent_uei_extract.py (no rate limit). SAM API rate: 1,000 req/day → full 2,334-UEI run = 2.3+ days.
Supplementary federal contract intel via HigherGov. PDFs require parse_highergov_pdfs.

EIA Open Data v2 power-sector time-series (net generation, capacity, consumption) for Puerto Rico, per registries/eia_series.yaml. Requires a free EIA_API_KEY (https://www.eia.gov/opendata/register.php). Supplements PREPA/LUMA operational monitoring.

FRED (St. Louis Fed) economic time-series for Puerto Rico indicators (employment, prices, income, etc.), per registries/fred_series.yaml. Requires a free FRED_API_KEY (https://fred.stlouisfed.org/docs/api/api_key.html). Cross-references territorial budgets and bond markets.
Preferred FEMA PA route. OpenFEMA v2 PA projects API.
PR Central Office for Recovery, Reconstruction and Resiliency project tracker.
Credentialed DRGR portal — operator must export and drop manifests in manual_drop_dir.

PRASA aqueduct/sewer authority. ingest_prasa.py is a dropzone reader (CSV/Excel), not a live scraper - operator delivers exported procurement files to data/raw/PRASA/. Includes Consulting Engineer Report FY2024 baseline. The vendor-level master is now produced by the prasa_contracts_master source (scripts/build_prasa_contracts_master.py).
Vendor-level aggregation of pr_prasa_contracts.csv. Closes the previously-dangling prasa_contracts_master.csv output (declared with no producer). Derived source; runs after the prasa dropzone ingest.
PREPA / LUMA Energy / Genera PR contracts and operating data.
Aggregate toll revenue (ACT / AutoExpreso / Metropistas PR-22/PR-5) from ACT audited financials and EMMA toll-revenue-bond disclosures. Dropzone reader; pursue finer (per-plaza) breakdowns via FOIA.
Aggregate port/airport fee revenue (PR Ports Authority + Aerostar/SJU) from audited financials and EMMA disclosures.
Aggregate transit farebox revenue (AMA buses + Tren Urbano / ATI) from audited financials and budgets.
Aggregate PRASA water/sewer rate revenue from audited financials, rate-case filings, and EMMA disclosures. Shares scripts/ingest_utility_revenue.py with prepa_luma_rate_revenue.
Aggregate PREPA/LUMA power rate revenue from audited financials and EMMA legacy revenue-bond disclosures. Shares scripts/ingest_utility_revenue.py with prasa_rate_revenue.

MSRB EMMA continuing-disclosure revenue extraction (toll/water/power bond-pledged revenue). The one authentication-free automatable revenue spine; cross-checks the manual dropzone figures. PDF extraction is best-effort.
DTOP/ACT permanent road construction & maintenance contracts (rolling, beyond the 2020 transition snapshot). OCPR registry agency code 032.
PR Ports Authority / Aerostar contracts and capital projects. Also fed by scripts/parse_aaa_ports_pdf.py from the acquired completed_projects_AAA.pdf.
AMA / Tren Urbano (ATI) operating and O&M contracts.
PR ACT transition contract files (Autopistas, Ferrovial, LPC&D, etc.). Manual export.
ACUDEN 2024 transition contract file. Transfer-of-funds contracts to municipalities/daycare/nonprofits.
DCAA FY2007/FY2012/FY2013 active contractor listings. Alias/crosswalk source.

PR Comptroller (OCPR) audit reports and findings on government entities and contractors. Operator delivers exported CSV/Excel to the dropzone. NOTE the OCPR contract registry (consultacontratos.ocpr.gov.pr) is a separate product still needing a dedicated scraper.
comprashpr.com RFP / award scrape.
PR Fiscal Agency & Financial Advisory Authority. Budget execution.

PR municipal Single Audit (SF-SAC) records from the Federal Audit Clearinghouse (api.fac.gov/general, auditee_state=PR, filtered to MUNICIPIO/MUNICIPALITY OF auditees). API-switch from the OCAM scraper; free api.data.gov key (FAC_API_KEY).

PR environmental enforcement (EPA ICIS-FE&C / ECHO) — federal penalties assessed against PR facilities. Automatable via the public, keyless ECHO Enforcement Case Search REST API (echodata.epa.gov; X_API_KEY sent opportunistically as an api.data.gov rate-limit header). Materialized by scripts/download_epa_echo_icis.py (endpoint/fields confirmed on first live run).

API-authoritative federal LDA lobbying source via LDA.gov. Canonical API provider alias: lda_gov. Default mode is dry-run fixture mode; live API calls require --live. No API key is required. Uploaded/static LDA snapshots are retained as regression fixtures or archival snapshots after adapter materialization.

PR Office of Government Ethics (OEG) state-level lobbyist (cabildero) registry. ingest_cabilderos.py is a dropzone reader (CSV/Excel), not a live scraper - operator delivers the OEG export to data/raw/Cabilderos/. Cross-references cabildero clients with federal award recipients to surface dual-influence entities.
pr_fec_crossref.csv is generated by analyze_fec_crossref.py after the unified awards master is entity-resolved (PR3 dependency). Not declared as expected_output to avoid gate failures before PR3.

PR State Election Commission (CEE/CEEPUR) state-level donation registry. ingest_donaciones.py is a dropzone reader for operator-delivered CEE CSV exports — no network code. Previously mislabeled as using ingest_fec.py (federal FEC) with a wrong output path. Cross-references federal FEC via analyze_political_crossref.py.

PR public-money export data (SF-133 budget execution, municipal political/federal bridge, facility contract matches). ingest_follow_the_money.py is a dropzone reader (no network code) producing 3 outputs from operator-delivered CSV exports in data/raw/follow_the_money/. Municipal-bridge and facility-match outputs materialize offline from committed inputs. NOTE - the EP_PR_PRBank_* bank-wire records previously co-located in this dropzone are Jeffrey Epstein PR-case records, not a public-money source; they were separated to the epstein_pr_case watchlist (registries/watchlists/epstein_pr_case.json) and are no longer ingested here.

FEC committee master plus Schedule B (disbursements) and Schedule E (independent expenditures) for PR-linked political committees. Makes PACs, Super PACs, 527s, and party committees first-class entities in the political-finance layer rather than only being embedded as committee_id/committee_name columns on Schedule A contribution rows handled by the existing `fec` source.

PR Oficina del Contralor Electoral (OCE) campaign-finance registry. Distinct from `oficina_contralor` (government-audit Contralor, a different agency). ingest_oce.py is a dropzone reader (no network code) producing pr_oce_donations.csv aligned column-for-column to pr_donaciones.csv so the NGO political-donation crossref consumes both feeds uniformly.

NGO / OSFL identity, funding, and coverage layer built from IRS EO BMF, TEOS, PR state registry, and USASpending drops. Also drives the NGO ↔ political-donation crossref (analyze_political_crossref: build_ngo_donation_crossref → data/staging/processed/ngos/ ngo_political_donations.csv) which is intentionally NOT declared as an expected_output to avoid preflight gate failures (matches the convention used by `fec` for pr_fec_crossref.csv).

Free, keyless GLEIF LEI database filtered to Puerto Rico (legalAddress country PR + jurisdiction US-PR, de-duped by LEI). Corporate identity (legal name, status, legal form, local registration number, addresses) plus direct/ultimate parent relationships. Replaces the OpenCorporates corporate-identity slice for the larger / financial PR entities.
Free, keyless officers/directors of PR-domiciled SEC filers, parsed from Form 3/4/5 insider-filing ownership XML. Replaces the OpenCorporates officers slice (whose seeds were all SEC filers).

OPTIONAL commercial provider for public-market entity resolution (CUSIP / ISIN / FIGI / LEI / CIK / ticker crosswalks). NOT a required source — never wired into coverage gates. Live use requires BOTH FINANCIALDATA_API_KEY and FINANCIALDATA_LICENSE_APPROVED=true. Default mode is dry-run/mock with synthetic fixtures. Raw vendor payloads are never persisted. See docs/financialdata_provider.md.
Federal direct loans and loan guarantees (assistance type 07/08) to PR recipients via the USASpending API. Captures face value + federal subsidy cost, distinct from contracts/grants.
Federal Single Audit (SF-SAC) results for PR auditees from the Federal Audit Clearinghouse. Oversight on subrecipients of federal awards. Free api.data.gov key (FAC_API_KEY).
SAM.gov exclusions (debarment) list — suspended/excluded parties. Screening complement to sam_entities and ofac_sdn. Requires SAM_API_KEY.
USDA FSA direct payments + RMA crop-insurance subsidies to PR producers via USASpending (assistance types 06/10). Distinct from rural-development usda_grants.
HUD CDBG-Mitigation (CFDA 14.272) allocations to PR via USASpending. Distinct from CDBG-DR (hud_cdbg_dr_public) and DRGR reporting (hud_drgr_authorized).
FEMA Individual Assistance / Individuals & Households Program housing aid to PR (OpenFEMA HousingAssistanceOwners). Direct-to-household disaster flow, distinct from Public Assistance and HMGP.
Qualified Opportunity Zone designated census tracts in PR (Treasury/IRS capital-gains incentive). Source URL configurable via OZ_DATA_URL; live pull requires network.
Federal civilian payroll (employment + average salary) in PR from OPM FedScope. Source URL configurable via FEDSCOPE_DATA_URL; live pull requires network.
DOJ / USAO-PR civil settlements and False Claims Act recoveries involving PR entities. Operator-delivered exports (no machine API).
DOJ/Treasury equitable-sharing asset-forfeiture payouts to PR law enforcement. Operator-delivered exports.
IRS Child Tax Credit / EITC payments to PR families (post-ARPA expansion), from SOI/Treasury exports. Operator-delivered.

Canonical PR Comptroller (OCPR) contract registry — every PR government contract. Distinct from oficina_contralor (audit reports only). Interactive surface; operator-delivered exports until a scraper is built.
DDEC Act 60/20/22 tax-incentive decrees (export-services / individual-investor grants). Operator-delivered exports.
CRIM municipal property-tax assessments and collections. Operator-delivered exports.
ASES Plan Vital Medicaid managed-care contracts and MCO capitation (territorial program spend). Distinct from federal medicaid_fmap match. Operator-delivered exports.
Loteria de Puerto Rico + Loteria Electronica revenue, prize payouts and retailer commissions. Operator-delivered exports.
PR Gaming Commission casino/slot-machine licensing and gaming-tax revenue. Operator-delivered exports.
PR Ports Authority concession fees and leases (e.g. Aerostar/LMM airport). Operator-delivered exports.
PR Highways & Transportation Authority toll revenue and Metropistas/Autopistas concession payments. Distinct from ACT transition contracts. Operator-delivered exports.
PR central-government payroll / salaries (OATRH Nomina). Operator-delivered exports.
OGPe construction-permit fees and green-energy incentives. Operator-delivered exports.
DTOP vehicle-registration (marbete) and license fee collections. Operator-delivered exports.
PR Tourism Company hotel-occupancy tax (impuesto de ocupacion) and co-op marketing contributions. Operator-delivered exports.
Banco de Desarrollo Economico (Economic Development Bank) territorial business loans. Distinct from federal SBA loans. Operator-delivered exports.
PR Public Housing Administration (AVP/PRPHA) operating subsidies and RAD conversions. Distinct from HUD Section-8 HCV. Operator-delivered exports.

PR Treasury Sales & Use Tax (IVU/SUT) collections by fiscal year / month / NAICS, plus COFIM municipal IVU — the largest PR consumption-tax revenue stream, not otherwise captured. Scraper surface (hacienda.pr.gov bulk tables); queued for a scraping adapter (scraper_needed).

Census government-finance / tax-collection figures for PR (FIPS 72) via the Census Data API. Automatable (needs CENSUS_API_KEY); materialized by scripts/download_census_gov_finances.py. Caveat - Census notes PR is excluded from many API datasets; the producer returns EMPTY gracefully if PR is absent from the chosen dataset (dataset/vars confirmed on first live run).

FTA National Transit Database — financial, funding-source, and operating-expense data for PR transit agencies (PRHTA, PRITA, Ports Authority). Automatable via the Socrata SODA API on data.transportation.gov; materialized by scripts/download_fta_ntd.py (NTD resource id confirmed on first live run).

Act 154 excise tax on foreign controlled corporations — historically ~$1.8B/yr and 13-21% of the General Fund, the single largest GF revenue line. Hacienda statistics surface; queued for a scraping adapter (scraper_needed).

PR individual & corporate income tax collections — the income-contribution series from the Instituto de Estadisticas / Datos.PR CKAN portal. Largest recurring General Fund revenue category. Automatable via the CKAN API (datos.estadisticas.pr); materialized by scripts/download_estadisticas_pr.py.

Consolidated PR General Fund net revenues by source (Instituto de Estadisticas "Ingresos Netos al Fondo General") — one authoritative series covering Act 154, income tax, IVU, arbitrios, licenses, lottery, customs, and rum cover-over. Automatable via the Datos.PR CKAN API (datos.estadisticas.pr); materialized by scripts/download_estadisticas_pr.py.

PR external-trade series (imports / exports) from the Instituto de Estadisticas / Datos.PR CKAN portal. Automatable via the CKAN API (datos.estadisticas.pr); materialized by scripts/download_estadisticas_pr.py alongside the General Fund revenue and income-tax series.

P0 - PRASA Capital Expenditure Report (CER) / audited financial-statement line items. Core financial-infrastructure evidence for PR's largest recovery-driven public corporation. Operator-delivered CSV extracts of the published PDFs.
P0 - PRASA Capital Improvement Program (CIP) project list (project, cost, status, fiscal year). Operator-delivered CSV extracts.
P0 - PRASA completed projects — FEMA 406 / COR3 recovery-infrastructure join bridge. Operator-delivered CSV extracts.

LegislaPR is a public legislative discovery and enrichment surface for Puerto Rico measures. Treat extracted summaries/pros/cons as non-authoritative. Promote only when the measure is cross-confirmed against OpenStates and official Assembly/SUTRA links.
Deterministic session index extracted from LegislaPR discovery output and OpenStates URLs. No external service calls.

Canonical confirmation layer for LegislaPR discovery candidates. Uses OpenStates API v3 and official Assembly/SUTRA document links; requires OPENSTATES_API_KEY unless running in explicit SUTRA-only audit mode.
Deterministic OpenStates-to-official Assembly/SUTRA crosswalk. No network calls; link confidence is based on discovered canonical URLs and confirmation status.
Manual-review candidate queue linking legislative measures to fiscal records through conservative fiscal terms and agency or municipality text alignment.

Targeted archival locator only. Do not use as a contract-award, financial-flow, or bulk archival source. Fetcher intentionally not implemented until a credential and bounded query allowlist are available. Persist minimal locator metadata only; do not store full responses, extracted text, or digital objects.
Future candidate for bulk archival metadata. Evaluate separately from the targeted Catalog API path after dataset location, format, licensing, and storage policy are verified.
